ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary or daily rate for the job */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g., permanent, contract) */,
  "shortlist" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the job is shortlisted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "requirements" TEXT /* Requirements for the job */,
  "skills_required" TEXT /* Skills required for the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who created the job posting */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the job posting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES job_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* LinkedIn profile of the candidate */,
  "github_profile" TEXT /* GitHub profile of the candidate */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who created the candidate profile */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the candidate profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being applied for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate applying for the job */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the job application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being interviewed for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being interviewed */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date the interview was conducted */,
  "interviewer" TEXT /* Name of the interviewer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the interviewer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the candidate (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiters" (
  "recruiter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiter */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the recruiter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recruiter */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the recruiter */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the recruiter (e.g., technical recruiter, account manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hiring_managers" (
  "hiring_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hiring manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the hiring manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the hiring manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the hiring manager */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the hiring manager (e.g., engineering manager, product manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hiring_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job offer */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being offered */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being offered the job */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary offered to the candidate */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the offer expires */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the job offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_offers_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being communicated about */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being communicated with */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the communication was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the message */,
  "receiver" TEXT /* Receiver of the message */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used for communication (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendars" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar event */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being scheduled */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being scheduled */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the recruiter who last updated the calendar event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES recruiters ("recruiter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendars_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being tracked */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being tracked */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., view, apply) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., recruiter, hiring manager, candidate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being messaged about */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being messaged */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message sent */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the message */,
  "receiver" TEXT /* Receiver of the message */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used for communication (e.g., email, phone, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_reminders" (
  "reminder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reminder */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the calendar event being reminded */,
  "reminder_date" TEXT /* Date of the reminder */,
  "reminder_time" TEXT /* Time of the reminder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reminder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reminder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_reminders_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES calendars ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "posting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_tags_posting_id FOREIGN KEY ("posting_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("posting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_tags_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
